creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #18)
The 1.26.4 release notes state that "this is the last planned release in the 1.26 series." 1.26.5 was released in May only for a few bug fixes. Meanwhile upstream have been tracking consumers' compatibility with 2.x: https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/26191
